name: XAUUSD_M15_BBRSI_MeanReversion
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, closes outside BB(20,2.0) coincident with RSI(7) extremes revert to the middle band when BB-width is in the 30-90th percentile (active but not climactic), yielding Sharpe>=1.5 and PF>=2.0.

regime_filter.notes: Avoid dead ranges and volatility blowouts.

entry_rules.long: Close < LowerBB(20,2.0) AND RSI(7) < 10 AND prior bar's close also below lower band OR touched it; enter on next bar open.
entry_rules.short: Close > UpperBB(20,2.0) AND RSI(7) > 90; enter next bar open.

exit_rules.take_profit: Middle BB (SMA20) touch OR opposite band, whichever first

falsifier: If win rate <55% or trades <200 over 3yr, or PF<1.6, kill.
